star_1.text: It was fun in the beginning, under level 450 to get you hooked. At first the game acts like a puzzle to solve, but that's not really not the case most of the time. The locked cages don't work the same from game to game, so you don't know what will unlock them. Multiple hits to open things, some obstacles are impossible to pass unless you buy boosters. When you do buy the boosters, the game controls where they go, which is a waste of money. In another game I'm at level 3697 just so you know.

This game has a good graphic and animation, and fun game as well. But when it comes to hard or extreme level, it was really drained my energy. Booster didn't even work out, coins didn't help. It was really annoying and super hard, impossible to finish! Took me days to complete one particular level. I saw many people here were complaining at the same thing, so it is obvious I am saying the truth. This game is ridiculously impossible and I am losing my interest.

Really hard after level 30. Don't play ituch as you get nothing when going each day. Adding more info as APP person replied. Game is too hard after level 60 for people over 45 and above. You don't get to enjoy the game as you are always stuck on a HARD or VERY hard level and even the easy levels are super hard if you don't have extra bonus stuff to help beat all the level. It forces you to BUY Stuff from the APP deV to really enjoy the game. Not my bucket of fun for me. You don't get any bonus or any thing like Idle bonus so yeah, you get stuck on a puzzle that is impossible to win if you don't get the extra stuff to blow them. i guess you need to be really inteligent to play this game. My Masters is just not enough. Sorry to say.

I am changing my review and uninstalling the gsme. Although i like the game it is ridiculously EXPENSIVE! IF you cant complete the game in the number designated & need more rime, they offer 5 more for $50; if you still need more tim e, the NEXT 5 will cost you $90; after that, each additional 5 extra moves cost $130.!!! Ridiculous. So i give it a 1 star and am uninstalling the game!

Keeping me tapping in the same corner for every turn! until I use up my boosters I suppose! I'd rather not play it! Got ridiculously hard now we're back on the island! it's so boring again now, it's supposed to be entertaining not so hard that it's impossible to get through it! It used to be my favourite game but not now! Nothings changed in months its still as bad! Had enough of it. Deleted!!!

The game is fun but with the new update after every few levels it just exits the game without notice. Otherwise I would give it four stars. The koala is cute but now everything about the game doesn't really work. I'll probably delete it in a few months. The videos for extra moves or coins won't load. Asking for lives also doesn't work most of the time. It says someone sent me a life and it doesn't show. The stages are more difficult and they want you to spend coins and boosters on every level.😬

Some levels are impossible to win. With the latest upgrade you have go through an never ending looping ads. Up date Level 1579 is impossible to beat unless you have extra bonus. Why the programmers make it impossible to win levels is beyond me. Thinking of just dropping the game all together. Update: I have been stuck on level 1579 for over a week. The level does not give you enough tries to solve the level. I have had enough and will delete the game. So long.

Edit- I keep having to reload the game to move to the next level. And now I try to play it the whole app closes in me making me lose lives and it won't let me play. Absolutely addicted to the game. But 1 little thing I can not stand is how fast the box pops up when you lose a level and I accidentally hit spend 50coins for 5 more moves. And I did not want to spend that. It would be nice to have a confirm button. Other wise love that it cost only 10 for full lives. Thank you!

Update: not only was my issue not fixed, but there are now so many ads that it's not even worth playing. It takes longer to get through an ad that actual play time. I was 2000 levels in when I realized my name wasn't my actual name on the leader board. So I signed into Facebook. Then the app says "here's your reward" ..it started me over from the beginning. I'm now back on level one. Wth

Worst cube game EVER!! It's so staged and so sad that Cube games now are so set up for you to lose so you have to use boosters and such which makes ALOT of people start spending Money. It's funny how when you need to get so many of a certain color that all of a sudden you won't have any tiles of that color. It makes it not fun at all, not challenging because everyone gets the same exact set up. it's a wonder why anyone would even play. I won't, I'm not falling for it.

I got a new phone and had to redownload the game. I logged in with the same facebook account as I done on my old phone only to realize none of my progress transferred over. I dont understand why not when im logged in using the same facebook account. I was in the level 2000's and ads free because I spent money to have no ads, but now I have to start all over at level 1 and pay to have the ads removed again. I THINK NOT! Because of this, I've lost all interest to play this game anymore.

App closes on its own during play and upon launching. I have tried to delete and reload app but all it did was make me lose all my points. I even tried to load on another phone but the same problem came up. Please fix this guys, I really love this game but I will have to delete it due to sheer frustration. Thank you for your time and in dealing with this nerve racking issue in a prompt manner. R Medeiros Highland, California

I've been playing this game for awhile now and I very disappointed with how many adds have now been placed in the game. They're relentless. It's a great game but after 1700 levels I'm quitting soley because of the adds. Find a different game where you don't lose so much play time.

Initially I love this game just the right amount of ads. However with the new update too many glitches it takes three sometimes four ads just to play one level. In addition it miscounts rewards and lives......... Enjoyable game is now very frustrating and actually I'd rather just move on to something else...

This is the second time I added boosters and they never add but they show used. What good is this? I've sent 2 emails! After about 5 emails this thieving game is finally working without stealing my boosters and not putting them in the game. Im reviewing them a 1 start because they never responded to my first 2 emails then they acted as if I was lying.

New update crashes constantly. Took 4 tries to get the game to load completely. Starts loading then crashes. I finally got it to load, then right at the end of a tough round that I was one move from completing, it crashed again.

This is very boring, not at all like the commercials to get you to download. Very disappointed I wanted to have a different experience with a match game but this is very childish great for kids I'm sure but don't advertise something that you're not even going to provide

This game just doesn't seem to work!!! 😕 It says it's "Firing Up," (loading) but it gets about 9/10's of the way & goes no further; such a pity I like this type of game. No choice but to uninstall the game as it is unplayable.😔

Another crappy puzzle game. Hit lvl 20 and no matter how much I played or how many different ways I played i can't pass. Plus the scores that are up there when you connect to Facebook r unreal. And BTW those people are NOT on my friends list on Facebook. In other words Not my friends. They r ppl who made or tested it

Always enjoyed playing this game but after changing my phone over the last few days I had to log in again. Easy enough done except I have now lost the lives I had built up as well as the cards and more importantly, my ad free play, which I am now being asked to pay for again. Not impressed hence the 1 star review!

star_2.text: Started out fun but VERY QUICKLY turned hard. I have played about 50 games of this type and deleted this one after 30 minutes. I know it is designed to be increadingly difficult, but this game jumps from easy to hard early on. Games are ALSO designed to get you to spend money to level. There are TOO MANY games out that are fun and TOTALLY FREE. This is not one of them.

The game was excellent before the ads were added. Now you have an ad after level won, another before next level and a 3rd one before playing next level. 3 in a row is crazy. Kills your vibe when playing this game. This used to be my #1 game but now I'm starting not to enjoy it. Its more of a chore now then fun. Its not to late to change the ad usage.

It was a fun game & l liked it. Until l got to the hard levels. Where I'm challenged to try to keep my boosters. But like always l lose them all. 30 or more bubbles, & letters, & 9 or more cactuses of different colors. Their ain't enough boosters to beat these hard levels. And I won't spend any $$$ to go to the next levels. I'm done & am uninstalling this game goodbye.

This game is rigged everything I have no moves left it gives me the option to watch a video for three extra moves but suddenly the video doesn't work and if you need more moves you are forced to use coins if you want to keep your boosters. It works until you have three bombs and three arrows to start the level than the video doesn't work. Then you have to start earning those boosters again.

I would rather play toon blast than Cube rush. Biggest drawback is that when you match fireball with arrow all the arrows work as just one arrow. Whereas in Toon blast all the arrows work separately and hit different targets. That gives you more chances to win. Also at one point Cube rush becomes frustrating. Toon blast gives more rewards hence more chances to win. If you are playing for fun and relaxation definitely Toon blast is the best.

The levels are either ridiculously easy or nearly impossible. Too many "hard" and "extreme" levels. Seems to be more ads and notices when you're playing with timed unlimited lives. UPDATE: Having to use power-ups for every single level detracts from enjoyment of the game. Uninstalling.

You don't get videos to watch you try to earn extra moves you're also stuck on a level I'm running out of moves and still have all these objects left to take out all this level is doing is taking all my heart what a little bit of coins I have is taking everything from me and I'm stuck here we don't even get extra moves offered to us at the end of the level then offering you challenges which is you can't win because you're always losing the level that you're stuck on so what's the point of this g

fun and the graphic is cute. But it always crash, sometimes at the end of the game after I earned hard for the tournament. And then now I was at top rank, and want to remain no. 1, all my free lives suddenly disappeared! I am really furious.

Disappointing after level 300 - it was a nice enjoyable game then suddenly it's flooded with adverts and the levels become so impossible it makes it hard to play without spending money. So I'm going to delete. But up to level 300 it's an ok game.

The box to get (5) more moves exactly in the middle of game. If you're on your last move, this box comes up so fast, I would end up buying moves if I had coins, instead of ending the game. What a RIP. Enough is enough!

I really love this game, but unfortunately, it doesn't work on my phone. No major glitches, but when I use my gold coins to purchase rockets, bombs, etc., I only get one item instead of three. I tried uninstalling and reinstalling, but no luck. Too bad, because it's really fun. Time to uninstall for good.

UPD: UNINSTALLINGI play Alot i <3 it I do recommend.Some levels need more moves than you give us, can still be challenging&With more moves I find myself using ALL my tools On 1 level 8/7 lol wonder why U acknowledge all the negative posts&Not the positive Biggest thing? why should i have to wait 20min to continue to play the game because i lost a few times on a level lol its annoying & makes no sense&Would have been no need to contact you before hand this is how you already have the game set up.

I enjoy this game but just in the last few days there are now loud ads after each level which weren't there at all before.. Very disappointed that I now have to listen to ads... It would be ok if you could select to keep all ads silent 😥
WARNING! this game constantly and consistently does not count items you need to complete the level. There is no way to contact the makers to get compensated for the money you spend. WARNING!
I like the game but some of the levels are really hard and no instructions to explain how it works. Forces you to spend money to pass the levels. Too expensive.
It is a good game, however, the number of ads are so high that it ruins the play. I understand the need for revenue, but to have an ad every 5 seconds for 5 seconds seems extreme.
This is a great game but it takes 4 days to beat an extreme level so if you dont spend money you dont get past the hard and extreme levels. Too bad, fun, no ads
This game was nice and enjoyable until they added ads after every level. There was already in-app purchase options. The ads are making me think about deleting it.

I started out thinking this game might be ok but by level 31 it gave me a board that I just had no chance of winning at all even with using every booster I had. Make it fair nobody likes a game you can't win. I am uninstalling your game sucks.
Liked it but a few levels in and I had an ad every other level. I don't mind ads but that is too many for me. Uninstalled

star_3.text: It's a fun game, the graphics are good, and the play is pretty easy. I'm sure it gets harder as the levels do. Yet as with so many games they fall short with coins. Too stingy with giving them and too costly to get them. Greed is more costly then Generosity but Generosity gives back much more (like 4 or 5 stars). It took about 30 levels to get enough coins to buy the least expensive power up.

Cute tap the set of blocks game. Feels super elementary still, at level 25 now. If I happen to find some chat type people in a group (yes, they have them) them maybe I'll play longer. We'll see. Lots of short ads (learn to find the x to turn them off in the middle). Even banner ads. If it wasn't so over run with ads... Oh. You CAN pay $5 for ad free. I'll probably uninstall in a few days because of the ads. I'm not even sure for how long that $5 turns them off. Meh Uninstalled two days later

I am uninstalling this !! Been stuck on 1169 for 5 days. Impossible to win!!! No booster's left it's not fun anymore.......?Edited review: more details? How is that possible? No it's not my connection/ internet. I can closed this game out and open another game or app with no issues. It took 5 minutes to load then the gift bag came up and it doesn't respond.

FUN game but unless you get lucky, it's almost impossible after the 1st few levels without the cheats. You earn small amounts of coins for achievements, but the Coin cost for extra moves is extremely high. EX: You earn 3-5 coins but if you need 5 extra moves, 50+ coins! Lower your move price/cheat price and I'd maybe re-install....

I like this game. Graphics is good. Some levels is essy some are hard. The only thing i hate about this game is - can you move the button which asks if you emd the end, do you want to carry on the game with extra goes/moves for xx amount of coins. Or add a confirmation button!! I have lost so many coins by accidentally pressing it because i didnt realise I've ran out of moves and i carry on pressing the screen and yep...that stupid button is there. Please fix!!

This game is very similar to several other games, but with so-so graphics. It's also harder to win levels as well as earn coins. On the plus side, you earn lives left and right, so you can keep trying. It doesn't give it cheats often and unlike the other games, you have to watch an ad every other loading screen. I wouldn't mind it so much if they were muted like I've got the game. Sudden screaming ads in the doctor's waiting room are embarrassing.

Ugh... I was on board with it until I realized that you can't replay any level you've beaten. This means if you fail to get 3 stars in a level you're screwed. There is no way to go back to pick up that star and you're left with a blemish that can't be fixed. You'll forever have just 29 of 30 stars. My OCD simply can not stand this. Uninstalled!

The reason I gave 3 stars only is that there isn't any helpful hints. Also you can't earn enough coins. To continue when you run out of time you have to pay 1000 coins or watch an ad. Many times it tells you 1 isn't available so you're screwed. It takes a long time to earn 1000 coins. You'll lose all of your helping weapons and any rewards you earned if you have to restart and/or restart molre than once

I play the game to keep my brain active. I leave the simplicity because it helps quiet my mind. I wish I could give five stars however, this game crashes all the time. It gets frustrating. After two levels and two crashes (yes that often) I just put it away.

Too slow getting to each new game. You can tap on "Skip" in order to get past the celebratory balloons and fireworks quicker but then comes the slow moving awarding of stars and awards and moving on to the next level. Speed up these last 3 items and you have a 5-star game.

I enjoy the game a lot, however if I answer a text or use another app for a second, it restarts the level. It's annoying because this causes me to lose lives in the game. Otherwise it's fun and a good way to zone out for a bit when I need it.

Tough puzzles are fine, but making them impossible to get money is just unfair. Players spend enough time watching ads you make money on. I'd like to not uninstall it, but when it gets to the point where advancing costs money, I feel I have no choice.

Was very nice BUT then I reached level 185 solo but then they made it impossible to go to next level unless you spend money.. you cannot win without buying boosters.. I tried with 18 lives and still failed.. so no way spending money on it.. uninstalled the app after that.. ps Install glasswire and firewall the app NO ADDS AT ALL ;)

Was loving this game and was on my way towards 3000 level. Now it has switched to "stages". Not sure if that was by design but I don't like it at all. I'm ready to uninstall after MONTHS of playing and spending over $300. The changes just irk me.

I have played the game off and on for 3+ years. Sadly, it hasn't changed much. It h still doesn't have anything new such as events and contests to play for prizes. So it becomes tedious and boring rather quickly. Once again I'll have to move on and look for something more rewarding to play.

I love the game, but I just wish you would include 'are you sure?' when it comes to 'continue game?'. I have lost so many coins by mistakenly pressing the screen, but realising that I'm out of moves. A failsafe like that would be so welcome

For some reason I'm not able to make a purchase in the store it keeps saying oops try again. Since last I wrote this review I have seen marked improvement in the purchase area I am no longer having any glitches and I I am enjoying the game very much
Game is good and fun, ads not too long but got to a hard level that's impossible to get anywhere near beating it without spending money. Even with the ads you get to a stage where you have no choice.
Used to enjoy the game more but lately it continually freezes after each level and it is very frustrating. Reached out to tech support, but no one had responded.

I really love this game but after the update today I can not get into the game at all. For some reason the initial loading bar will not completely load and it will not continue. If you fix this bug i will come back and change this review to 5 stars

star_4.text: Fun game for approx 250 levels. After that you cannot pass levels without using many many tools. You are forced to spend $$ to pass levels....because each time you try, you burn thru you hearts (lives). No option to purchase lives. No option to watch ads for tools or hearts. Compared to similar games, this game is stingy with the amount of free tools you can earn. I don't mind paying reasonable amount to play, but this game could be bottomless pit of $$ grabbing.

I started playing this game and saw it was just like Koala Crush, which is cool, but than after some levels there's an ad. I thought it was going to be a pain to play, but they are short ads and after trying to beat a hard or extreme level a number of times, they will lose 1 color or make it so skill will allow you to beat the level rather than spending any money to win. I like that much better than some or most other games. Enjoy...🙃🙃

Really love this game. I put $ aside to use for continue game play as I don't like waiting for new lives. However,I dislike being on champion island without a chance to leave it. Also,its harder to win rewards. I've been on for two weeks now, stage 596 that's wayyyyy to long. Thinking of giving my money to a game that doesn't make you wait for new levels. Shame ,because I really liked this game.

My one complaint is when I have more than one rocket or bomb ganging up on a task that requires multiple hits, the game only registers one. Example: ducks in a row. I can have an arrow shooting from one direction and a bomb blowing up on the other but only one duck is removed. Same across other tasks. Really screws up my strategy.

So far so good, I'm not exactly sure what the problem is, but every now and then, the game itself will pause for about 5 to 8 seconds, this game is very fun and entertaining, I like the way it plays and performs, so maybe you could please look into this problem for me, that would be a really big help, other than that, I really like playing this game, but when it does pause like that, it does keep getting kind of annoying, then I will change my rating to 5 stars!

Fun easy game. When I want to de-stress I am not looking for a real challenge. Just simple relaxation. I am not very far in this one so we shall see how far I get and then delete it. No big deal. I wish these games came with different challenge modes you could choose from. Easy, intermediate, and difficult.

This is basically the same as Toy blast. Which is great on the first levels, but when you get to the harder levels, you have to spend 25 coins for an extra 5 moves. The coins are very hard to come by and the ratio between what you get and what you need, is ridiculous. At this point, I end up uninstalling them. Which is a shame, as they're great games.

Update: This year the game seemed to be working well. But I just encountered a problem a couple days ago where I can't watch an ad to get three free moves. I've tried the changing my internet connection fix, and it hasn't worked so far. Makes the game a lot harder to play. Would appreciate a fix.

If you lose a level don't be tempted to pay to continue. Just treat it like older arcade games and just play until you defeat the level. There are many temptations to use coins to keep playing. If you buy your way out consistently you'll go broke.

I like the game... Although the placement of the "continue playing for x amount of coins" button is in a terrible spot and has cost me more coins then I care to admit. 1 star taken because of that. Otherwise very enjoyable. Level 1004 and counting 🙂

It has been fun so far. Glad to not have to spend money. My problem is that I am on 132 and can't figure out how to break the jail bars. I tried to look up how to break the walls but found the one explination, but when I tried to break the sides or top areas they don't break. Need a look-up sign so people could refer back, as a referrence tool. Thank you. It has been interesting, for sure.

They need to make more things available such as rewards during play not just major pay options give like five free moves when you cant clear your board just like panda pop does and lower the price of be able to buy things they make it say i have 100.00 coins you need two hundred to get an advantage they like double ir triple prices so it makes it totaly impossible

Could potentially earn 5 stars - however it seems the game does not allow cross-platform to play with IOS friends. Hoping this is something that could be implemented in a near future update. Otherwise, game is addictive and a good time killer 😎

I would give 5☆ but, sadly, you do not offer Any packages for purchase that give u Unlimited Lives. There is no way to Get more lives except thru the Hearts or time... Honestly, thinking about it, I Almost wanna drop it to 3☆! Otherwise I LOVE this game!

Very fun and addictive but after one of the last updates, I max out the score at 10,000 every time I 3 star a level... 10k seems too low for Max score and I don't feel I should be maxing the score multiple levels in a row. I shouldn't complain that I'm maxing the score, but it's not fun if I'm always the best🙄

I'm enjoying the game so far. The only drawback is all the ads. Also I'm trying to join a room that was setup by my friends. Nothing works it keeps saying Team not found. This I don't understand. Overall it's very fun game.

This game is addicting it's under single-level or so hard I start freaking out like saying my phone for hours sometimes it's not relaxing at all in fact I start having some anxiety from it but it's a really fun game so I recommend having it but only stay on it for like an hour makes me happy though

I enjoyed the game until I got to level 120. Not too many ads really, I'm on AT&T with an S10 if that means anything. Just got too hard, it's not fun to keep playing the same level over and over with no apparent solution.
Fun game. If you struggle to beat a round after a certain number of attempts, they do make it easier to beat. But some rounds are just impossible to beat without help. Ok amount of ads

I would rate it 5, if there's any info of points earned calculation method. What do you count: less moves? Moves left quantity? Using super bombs and combo? Time? Please tell us so we'd improve our score.

star_5.text: This is the best game I've played! No ads, option to play a difficult level with no limit to number of tries (might have to wait for lives to restore)... several times I have paid a fair low price for more coins/boosts etc. but only because I don't like to battle levels with ice (it grows back.) Also, I like that there is a learning curve for new features and satisfying rewards for mastery.

I love WHAFF app!! Not only can I track my activities and mood, but it's great to be able to log and look back on activities of my day and everything I've achieved. What's even better is that you can add and edit your moods and activities to suit you. It also provides stats as well as a space to add notes, so you can get a much bigger picture of your moods, what you have achieved and your average day. Absolutely brilliant!! Thank you Daylio Team!! 😃

I love this game. But the one thing that REALLY IRRITATES me, is if you go to the Shop screen, they have an extra long hold set up, until you can click away from it and all it does is irritate me and undo the relaxing I enjoyed while playing the game. Why do they have to do that? If I want to buy anything I will do so, if I can't or don't want to, don't try force it in players. I feel like deleting this game. 😡 I need another review, I can't write all here.

A good diversion, in unoccupied moments. Colorful graphics; play is straightforward 3-block matching. Progression is easy, at least at first; it's only my first day & I've made it to level 40 or something, without needing to spend actual money for boosts. I'll continue to enjoy this game for as long as I can, without spending money.👍

I Love this game! Im beyond level 3000.. it gets hard but they are beatable. Its a nice way to relax at the end of the day. I see a lot of complaining about the ads! And yes, there are alot of them. What i did was bite the bullet 1 time and made like a 3 dollar purchase and the ads were gone for good. Well worth it!

I love this game. Most games like this only give you a few levels until the games get very challenging and take days to complete levels. There are challenging levels but it doesn't take so long to get through them. This game also gives rewards a lot more often than others. I am addicted because I can play without the stress of not being able to pass a level.

So far, a fairly easy game, but I suspect it will get harder as we go along. No money as yet, but a few offers to buy tools, so I figure there will be a need further along. But you do get rewards, so earning the tools needed to progress is possible. Will see if it is possible to continue to play w/o spending $$. Not a real brain drain, but relaxing.

Awesome game. Reading the description before I downloaded the game met what I was looking for in a new game to play. I am not disappointed in the game play. The colors are bright and refreshing. Yet, there are a few areas that would keep this game even more awesome: if the boosters were not so pricey and the coins rewards were higher in the amount given out. Other than these two areas of thought the game is doing what it says in the description. Thank you for a fun-filled relaxing game.

I haven't been playing this game very long by (just hit level 50) but I am really enjoying this game. While not totally original in gameplay, it's got many elements that make it feel fresh & new. Nice graphics that change throughout the levels add further interest and dimension. While there are ads between levels, they don't feel excessive & overbearing, and they can be quickly & easily dismissed. This is a nicely done game, well worth the download, and worthy of all 5 of the rating stars!

Only 2 issues. One is that the game *can* get expensive if you want to be in tournaments and win. Two, there isn't an exit button so I have to close the game while it is still in the play mode, much like a hard turn off on a PC. I like the old days when you could buy a game for $19.95 and no further purchase was needed.

The best part for me, is that (at least in the levels under 100) the levels are winnable without having to spend a bunch just to pass to the next one. Makes the game more fun. Some levels that are really hard, are eventually won if you don't give up and try to take the easy way out.

Game is fun ~ But it's so slow going from one level to another. Too many commercials by far how about 1 every 15 minutes! Not going to make purchases, right from the get go it's one add every level to purchase pkgs., to download other games? When your trying to play Cube Rush Adventure?

This is an adorable little game where you pop blocks of matching colours which are touching, in order to complete the instructions given. You can join a team and play in a group, or make your own team, and play alone if nobody joins. It is a nice little time waster.

So far, so good. It has many of my favorite helpful options like trans directional arrows and daily goodies. Now I just need to see how much that squeezes down until the next review. They all start out like sunshine and lollipops then many turn out to be Vegas after dark. See you in the next round.

I'm loving this game, the farther up the levels the better it gets. I'm loving the tournament play, it's always interesting to see how you play under a little fun competition 😉😁! Kudo,s to the developer's it's been alot of fun. It's a fun way to pass the time, as our world struggles with this Coved19 Pandemic. Thanks

Excellent game, beats all others like it. Always giving freebies- and no need to use help each level, so they add up, no ADs, and levels progress in difficulty but not so much you want to quit lol, glad I ran across it. Thanks!

Game is Great fun. Coin rewards could be better. The boosters are expensive! But I play without boosters when possible, so... A problem for children playing. Why can't these games be more fair? The Developers have made a bundle off us Players. There should be a balance. How much money do they need! 😊🙏🍀

Nice! Very, very enjoyable!(1st review); (2nd review)4/30/21: after 1st year I am still here trying to find out what draws me back here. There are just too many things to do along the way that piques my curiosity and strategic planning for each new level, but thankfully I don't have to be a brain surgeon to beat the levels! LOL!!! I do enjoy the challenges of this game for all ages! Thanks, guys!🤗😉😜

This game is rather samey through the levels. But once you go past level 30, you can play bonus levels. My favourite one is trying to remove all the bombs before the kittens get blown up. Addictive and thrilling at the same time.🙂

Absolutely Love This Match Game!! I have been playing it for 2 or 3 months, and they have been Upgrading & Adding New things in the App, which have All Been Fantastically Done!! Keep Up The Great Work Guys, Your on the Right Track. I Recommend this Match Game to Everyone. ✔💯🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟👍
